text: Lebanon’s health ministry said early on Saturday that Israeli strikes in the south of the country killed 14 medical workers and injured six more. The strikes took place in the towns of al-Sawaneh and Borj Qalaouiye. The ministry said the slain medical workers, like most emergency workers in southern Lebanon, were affiliated with either the social services arm of Hezbollah or with the Shia Amal Movement. The Israeli military did not immediately respond to questions about the strikes early on Saturday.
title: Britain warns its citizens in Dubai they could be jailed for sharing photos of damage from airstrikes.

citability.title: Britain warns its citizens in Dubai they could be jailed for sharing photos of damage from airstrikes.
